programme.title: Tennis: Victoria Tomova - Maria Sakkari
programme.desc: WTA 1000 2025. Watch the BNP Paribas Open Women's Tennis Tennis Games of the WTA 1000 series, which takes place in the US in the US Wells.

programme.title: WTA 250 2025
programme.desc: Rouen, quarter -finals. Watch the Women's Women's Tennis Tennis Tournaments Rouen Metropole of the WTA 250 series, held in Rouen, France, April 14-20.

programme.title: WTA 1000 2025
programme.desc: Madrid, fourth -final. Watch the Mutua Madrid Open Women's Tennis Tennis Tournament Games of the WTA 1000 series, which takes place from April 22 to May 4 in Madrid.

programme.title: WTA 1000 2025
programme.desc: Rome, the quarter -finals. You are watching the WTA 1000 series of Internazionali Bnl d'Italia Tennis Tennis Tennis Tennis Tennis, which takes place between May 6 to May 18 in Rome, Italy.

programme.title: WTA 500 2025
programme.desc: Strasbourg, 1st quarter. Watch the Internationaux De Strasbourg Women's Tennis Tennis Tournament Games of the WTA 500 series held in Strasbourg between May 18-24.

programme.title: WTA 250 2025
programme.desc: Morocco, the quarter -finals. Watch the Rabat Grand Prix Tennis Tennis Tennis Tournaments of the WTA 250 series in Morocco from May 19-24.

programme.desc: Again near you at 12:00. The channel covering top events from the entire spectrum of sport with a focus on WTA tournaments, the Davis Cup and the Wimbledon, which give unique moments of action to tennis friends.

programme.title: The League: No Comments
programme.desc: A look back at the top games from the latest race, through extensive snapshots and spectacular shots.

programme.title: FIA KARTING Championship 2025
programme.desc: Valencia. The FIA ​​Karting Championship is the most famous Kart event in the world. Several champions, such as Aiton Senna, Allen Prost and Max Ferstapen, have participated and won the F1 World Driving Championship.

programme.title: Football: Olympiacos - PAOK
programme.desc: Super League K19. Cup final. Olympiacos and PAOK clash in the Super League K19 Cup final held at Theodoros Vardinogiannis Stadium in Heraklion, Crete and claiming the first trophy of the new event.

programme.title: Snapshots: UEL & UECL 2024-25
programme.desc: Final Uel. Weekly Magazine with phases and goals from the top UEFA intercourse.

programme.title: Football: Betis - Chelsea
programme.desc: UEFA Conference League 2024-25. Final. Betis and Chelsea will fight for the UEFA Conference League trophy in Wroclaw. Description: Andrea Palobarini.

programme.title: Football: Arsenal - Paris Saint -Germain
programme.desc: UEFA Champions League 2024-25. Semi -final, 1st race. The new era of the UEFA Champions League is here. 36 groups in a single group, aimed at the coveted trophy. Real Madrid is the title owner. Description: Giorgos Thanilakis.

programme.title: Football: Barcelona - Inter
programme.desc: UEFA Champions League 2024-25. Semi -final, 1st race. The new era of the UEFA Champions League is here. 36 groups in a single group, aimed at the coveted trophy. Real Madrid is the title owner. Description: Sotiris Kostavaras.

programme.title: Football: Betis - Chelsea
programme.desc: UEFA Conference League 2024-25. Final. Betis and Chelsea will fight for the UEFA Conference League trophy in Wroclaw. Description: Andrea Palobarini.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Magazine 2024-25 E34
programme.desc: A series of broadcasts dedicated to the UEFA Champions League with players and coaches, presentation of team profiles and exclusively shots from the top event.

programme.title: Football: Tottenham - Manchester United
programme.desc: UEFA Europa League 2024-25. Final. Tottenam and Manchester United will fight in Bilbao for Uel's trophy and participation in the UCL League Phase of the 2025-26 season. Description: Costas Psarras.

programme.title: Football: Trampzonspor - Barcelona
programme.desc: UEFA Youth League 2024-25. Final. The 11th season of the UEFA Youth League includes 64 teams divided into two groups, each with 32 teams. Olympiacos is the holder of last year's title. The Colobrei Stadium in Nyon will host the semifinals and the final. Description: Christos Kyriazis.

programme.title: Sports Classics: Worldies Ε12
programme.desc: From the F1 to the high dive and a bunch of other extreme sports, each show presents and highlights through 5 videos some of the most incredible moments, events and athletes in all sports sports.

programme.title: Football: Betis - Chelsea
programme.desc: UEFA Conference League 2024-25. Final. Betis and Chelsea will fight for the UEFA Conference League trophy in Wroclaw. Description: Andrea Palobarini.

programme.title: 2025 UEFA Champions League Final Show (Ζ)
programme.desc: See all the action of the UEFA Champions League final.

programme.title: UEL & UECl Magazine 2024-25 E22
programme.desc: Episode: Uel review season. Weekly Magazine with phases and goals from the top UEFA intercourse.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Magazine 2024-25 E33
programme.desc: A series of broadcasts dedicated to the UEFA Champions League with players and coaches, presentation of team profiles and exclusively shots from the top event.

programme.title: UEFA Champions League Magazine 2024-25 E34
programme.desc: A series of broadcasts dedicated to the UEFA Champions League with players and coaches, presentation of team profiles and exclusively shots from the top event.

programme.title: 2025 UEFA Champions League Final Show
programme.desc: See all the action of the UEFA Champions League final.

programme.title: Snapshots: UEL & UECL 2024-25
programme.desc: Final Uel. Weekly Magazine with phases and goals from the top UEFA intercourse.

programme.title: Football: Arsenal - Paris Saint -Germain
programme.desc: UEFA Champions League 2024-25. Semi -final, 1st race. The new era of the UEFA Champions League is here. 36 groups in a single group, aimed at the coveted trophy. Real Madrid is the title owner. Description: Giorgos Thanilakis.

programme.title: Football: Betis - Chelsea
programme.desc: UEFA Conference League 2024-25. Final. Betis and Chelsea will fight for the UEFA Conference League trophy in Wroclaw. Description: Andrea Palobarini.

programme.title: Football: Urakan - Corinthians
programme.desc: Copa Sudamericana 2025. Group phase, 6th race. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Serie A Full Impact 2024-25 Ε38
programme.desc: A magazine dedicated to the Italian league. He presents interviews with players, snapshots and previews from upcoming games.

programme.title: Sports Classics: Football's Greatest IV Ε9
programme.desc: Watch an episode of the documentary series dedicated to the best players of all time.

programme.title: Sports Classics: My Sporting Moment
programme.desc: Sorentam. Top athletes talk about the best moment of their careers.

programme.title: Football: Panathinaikos - Olympiacos
programme.desc: Stoiximan Super League 2024-25. Playoffs, positions 1-4, 6th race. Eternal derby at OAKA, with the definite second Panathinaikos hosting the champion Olympiacos. Description: Costas Psarras.

programme.title: Football: Eboli - Greece Verona
programme.desc: Serie A 2024-25. 38th race. The 123rd season of the top category of Italian football raises 20 teams, with Inter the title. Juventus or Milan will be able to win the scudetto or Nerazzurri will again conquer the trophy description: George Bitsikokos.

programme.title: Football: Lazio - Lecce
programme.desc: Serie A 2024-25. 38th race. The 123rd season of the top category of Italian football raises 20 teams, with Inter the title. Juventus or Milan will be able to win the scandetto or the waterproof will again conquer the trophy description: Apostolis Panos.

programme.title: Football: Athens Kallithea FC - PAS Lamia
programme.desc: Stoiximan Super League 2024-25. Playouts, 10th race. Athens Kallithea and Lamia bid farewell to the big category and want to do it with victory. Description: Tolis Christoforakis.

programme.title: Football: Turin - Roma
programme.desc: Serie A 2024-25. 38th race. The 123rd season of the top category of Italian football raises 20 teams, with Inter the title. Juventus or Milan will be able to win the scudetto or the waterfall will again conquer the trophy description: Andrea Palobarini.

programme.title: Football: Venice - Juventus
programme.desc: Serie A 2024-25. 38th race. The 123rd season of the top category of Italian football raises 20 teams, with Inter the title. Juventus or Milan will be able to win scudetto or Nerazzurri will again conquer the trophy description: Giorgos Thanilakis.

programme.title: Football: Panetolikos - Panserraikos
programme.desc: Stoiximan Super League 2024-25. Playouts, 10th race. With the aim of winning the Playouts finale, Panetolikos and Panserraikos are confronted with Agrinio. Description: Alkis Tsavdaras.

programme.title: Football: Udinese - Fiorentina
programme.desc: Serie A 2024-25. 38th race. The 123rd season of the top category of Italian football raises 20 teams, with Inter the title. Juventus or Milan will be able to win the scudetto or Nerazzurri will again conquer the trophy description: Tolis Christoforakis.

programme.title: Football: Panathinaikos - Olympiacos
programme.desc: Stoiximan Super League 2024-25. Playoffs, positions 1-4, 6th race. Eternal derby at OAKA, with the definite second Panathinaikos hosting the champion Olympiacos. Description: Costas Psarras.

programme.title: Football: Milan - Monza
programme.desc: Serie A 2024-25. 38th race. The 123rd season of the top category of Italian football raises 20 teams, with Inter the title. Juventus or Milan will be able to win scudetto or Nerazzurri will again win the trophy description: Dimitris Spiliopoulos.

programme.title: Football: Crystal Palace - Manchester City
programme.desc: Emirates fa cup 2024-25. Final. The 144th season of the world's oldest football tournament allows its winners to qualify for the UEFA Europa League 2025/26. Description: Giorgos Thanilakis.

programme.title: William Hill Scottish Premiership - Snapshots
programme.desc: 38th race. Check out the highlights of the 1st division of Scottish football, the second oldest league in Europe.

programme.title: Football: Braga - Benfica
programme.desc: Liga Portugal Betclic 2024-25. 34th race. The 91st season of the Portuguese League ends in May 2025. Until then, 18 teams will fight for the title, the positions that lead to Europe and the avoidance of relegation. Sporting Lisbon is the champion. Description: Apostolis Panos.

programme.title: Football: International - Baia
programme.desc: Copa Libertadores 2025. Group phase, 6th race. In the 66th season of the top South America competition, 47 clubs from 10 countries participate. The Brazilian Botafogo is the trophy owner. Which team will be able to conquer the most precious trophy of Epirus Description: George Bitsikokos.

programme.title: Football: Al Tithad - Damak
programme.desc: Roshn Saudi League 2024-25. 34th race. The Saudi Arabian league brings 18 teams in the 2024-25 season, in which great stars, such as Cristiano Ronaldo. Al-Hilal is Polynesian with 19 titles, having won last year's championship. Description: Paris Tselepidis.

programme.title: Football: OFI - Olympiacos
programme.desc: Greek Cup Betsson 2024-25. Final. OFI and Olympiacos will fight at the OAKA for the title of Greek Cup. Description: Andrea Palobarini.

programme.title: William Hill Scottish Premiership - Snapshots
programme.desc: 38th race. Check out the highlights of the 1st division of Scottish football, the second oldest league in Europe.

programme.title: Sports Classics: Worldies Ε9
programme.desc: From the F1 to the high dive and a bunch of other extreme sports, each show presents and highlights through 5 videos some of the most incredible moments, events and athletes in all sports sports.

programme.title: Football: Al Fatech - Al Nasr
programme.desc: Roshn Saudi League 2024-25. 34th race. The Saudi Arabian league brings 18 teams in the 2024-25 season, in which great stars, such as Cristiano Ronaldo. Al-Hilal is Polynesian with 19 titles, having won last year's championship. Description: Andreas Sereveta.

programme.title: Football: Sheffield United - Sunderland
programme.desc: Sky Bet Efl Championship 2024-25. Players, final. The 2nd division of English football consists of 24 teams, 3 of which will win the Premier League. Description: Michalis Tsogos.

programme.title: Football: International - Baia
programme.desc: Copa Libertadores 2025. Group phase, 6th race. In the 66th season of the top South America competition, 47 clubs from 10 countries participate. The Brazilian Botafogo is the trophy owner. Which team will be able to conquer the most precious trophy of Epirus Description: George Bitsikokos.

programme.title: Football: Al Hilal - Al Kantsia
programme.desc: Roshn Saudi League 2024-25. 34th race. The Saudi Arabian league brings 18 teams in the 2024-25 season, in which great stars, such as Cristiano Ronaldo. Al-Hilal is Polynesian with 19 titles, having won last year's championship. Description: Dimitris Xarlis.

programme.title: Emirates fa cup 2024-25 - snapshots
programme.desc: Final review. Watch the highlights of the English Cup.

programme.title: Football: Aves - Morense
programme.desc: Liga Portugal Betclic 2024-25. 34th race. The 91st season of the Portuguese League ends in May 2025. Until then, 18 teams will fight for the title, the positions that lead to Europe and the avoidance of relegation. Sporting Lisbon is the champion. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: NBA Specials: Basketball Stories
programme.desc: Iceman: A George Gervin Story. NBA snapshots and documentaries.

programme.title: Basketball: Oklahoma City Thunder - Minnesota Timberwolves (G)
programme.desc: NBA Playoffs 2025. Western District Finals, 5th Race. Description: Kyriakos Kouroutsavouris.

programme.title: Basketball: Tenerife - Valencia
programme.desc: ACB LIGA ENDESA 2024-25. 33rd race. The leading Spanish basketball championship features European superpowers such as Barcelona, ​​Basconia, Gran Canaria, Unikaha Malaga, as well as the leader Real Madrid. A total of 18 groups claim the title, including the newly enlightened Gida and Coruna. Description: Yiannis Fileris.

programme.title: Basketball: Tenerife - AEK
programme.desc: FIBA Basketball Champions League 2024-25. 3rd place final. Watch the FIBA ​​Basketball Champions League. 32 teams enter the start of the group stage, to the final that will highlight the champion. Description: Giannis Fileris.

programme.title: NBA Specials: Basketball Stories
programme.desc: Indiana Glory. NBA snapshots and documentaries.

programme.title: Basketball: Oklahoma City Thunder - Minnesota Timberwolves
programme.desc: NBA Playoffs 2025. Western District Finals, 5th Race. Description: Kyriakos Kouroutsavouris.

programme.title: Basketball: Basconia - Bilbao
programme.desc: ACB LIGA ENDESA 2024-25. 33rd race. The leading Spanish basketball championship features European superpowers such as Barcelona, ​​Basconia, Gran Canaria, Unikaha Malaga, as well as the leader Real Madrid. A total of 18 groups claim the title, including the newly enlightened Gida and Coruna. Description: Aris Barkas.

programme.title: Basketball: Virtu Bologna - Venice
programme.desc: Lega Basket Serie A 2024-25. Quarter -finals, 5th match. The Italian basketball championship is getting ready to give us an exciting new season. Champion Armani Milan and Wirtu Bologna will continue to fight for the title or we will have to expect surprises: Nikos Koulouris.

programme.desc: See the best snapshots of the 5th season of the Spanish league

programme.title: Fim World Women's Motorcycle Championship 2024
programme.desc: Italy (1st race). The World Women's Motorcycle Championship is a series of women only races and includes six rounds and a preparation test, all integrated into the World Superbike World Championships. Description: Dimitris Diatsidis.

programme.title: Fim World Women's Motorcycle Championship 2024
programme.desc: Italy (2nd race). The World Women's Motorcycle Championship is a series of women only races and includes six rounds and a preparation test, all integrated into the World Superbike World Championships. Description: Dimitris Diatsidis.

programme.title: MotoGP: There Can Be Only One Κ3 Ε1
programme.desc: Athletic documentary.

programme.title: Snapshots: Roc Nations Cup 2025
programme.desc: Some of the best drivers in the world have the unique opportunity to compete in identical cars to judge who is the fastest of all.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, SS11 Iszka 2. With a starting year in 1953, the FIA ​​European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport. Description: Giannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, SS12 TES 2. With a start year in 1953, the FIA ​​European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport. Description: Giannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, SS13 Nagyloter 2. With a starting year in 1953, the FIA's European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport. Description: Giannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, review. With a start year in 1953, the FIA's European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport.

programme.title: Sports Classics: Gearing Up 2025 Ε4
programme.desc: Exciting races from the most demanding events. Rocky terrain, deep rivers, exhaustive races in the desert, dirt roads and asphalt speed races. Enjoy all this in a row full of action.

programme.title: Red Bull MotoGP Rookies Cup 2024
programme.desc: France, Le Man - 1st race. 2024 is the 18th season of the Rookies Cup, with 235 riders from 38 countries. Starting from Portugal in April, the series is transferred to Europe's classic Grand Prix and ends in Misano, Italy in September. Description: Thanasis Kelafis.

programme.title: Red Bull MotoGP Rookies Cup 2024
programme.desc: France, Le Man - 2nd race. 2024 is the 18th season of the Rookies Cup, with 235 riders from 38 countries. Starting from Portugal in April, the series is transferred to Europe's classic Grand Prix and ends in Misano, Italy in September. Description: Thanasis Kelafis.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, review. With a start year in 1953, the FIA's European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport.

programme.desc: The broadcast for all developments in motor sport championships hosted by COSMOTE TV (MotoGP, WRC, ERC, DTM).

programme.desc: Hungary, SS11 Iszka 2. With a starting year in 1953, the FIA ​​European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport. Description: Giannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.desc: Sports documentaries.

programme.title: MotoGP: Dream On Ε2
programme.desc: Sports documentaries.

programme.title: MotoGP 2025 - snapshots
programme.desc: Grand Prix UK. MotoGP, the World Motorcycle Championship, offers many emotions. Watch a concentrated version of what happened in one of the 2024 races.

programme.title: WRC 2025
programme.desc: Portugal, SS24 FAFE 2 Wolf Power Stage. Watch the 2025 World Rally Championship. Description: Yiannis Marios Papadopoulos.

programme.title: DTM 2025 - snapshots
programme.desc: Germany, Lositzrid. The German DTM Tourism Championship brings to the friends of motor sport action, speed and craftsmanship from leading international drivers.

programme.title: DTM 2025
programme.desc: Germany, Laucinging (1st race). The German Tourism Championships hosts modified cars on the road. Description: Christos Kyriazis.

programme.title: DTM 2025
programme.desc: Germany, Laucinging (2nd race). The German Tourism Championships hosts modified cars on the road. Description: Christos Vassiliou.

programme.title: ERC 2025
programme.desc: Hungary, review. With a start year in 1953, the FIA's European Rally Championship is the ultimate training field for new talents aimed at the top of the sport.

programme.title: WRC 2024
programme.desc: Portugal, race review. Watch the 2024 World Rally Championship.

programme.title: DTM 2025 - snapshots
programme.desc: Germany, Lositzrid. The German DTM Tourism Championship brings to the friends of motor sport action, speed and craftsmanship from leading international drivers.

programme.title: Grand Prix 2025 broadcast
programme.desc: The broadcast for all developments in motor sport championships hosted by COSMOTE TV (MotoGP, WRC, ERC, DTM).

programme.title: Beach Volley: Pro Tour Elite 16 2025
programme.desc: Brasilia (Men's Final). The Beach Pro Tour returns to Mexico, which this time will host Elite16 from March 26th to March 30th. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: ATP 500 2025 - snapshots
programme.desc: Hamburg. Watch the snapshots of the main matournahs of the ATP 500 tournaments, belonging to the 4th stage of the annual men's tennis events.

programme.title: Boxing: Tears Inue - Ramon Cardenna
programme.desc: Boxing 2025. Undisputed Super Bantamweight World Championship. Watch the most exciting boxing battles, where athletes from different countries and weight categories conflict for epic titles and cash prizes. Description: Christos Vassiliou.

programme.title: Tennis: Men's Greek - Women's Cup 2025
programme.desc: Men's single final. See the tennis matches of the Greek Cup. Description: Marisa Georgitsis, Yiannis Kyfonidis.

programme.title: ATP 500 2025 - snapshots
programme.desc: Hamburg. Watch the snapshots of the main matournahs of the ATP 500 tournaments, belonging to the 4th stage of the annual men's tennis events.

programme.title: Premier Padel Tour 2025
programme.desc: Asunion (men's final). Premier Padel is the only event that offers official players and P1 tournaments award 1000 points and a big cash prize to the winners. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Sports Classics: Worldies Ε8
programme.desc: From the F1 to the high dive and a bunch of other extreme sports, each show presents and highlights through 5 videos some of the most incredible moments, events and athletes in all sports sports.

programme.title: Sports Classics: Worldies Ε9
programme.desc: From the F1 to the high dive and a bunch of other extreme sports, each show presents and highlights through 5 videos some of the most incredible moments, events and athletes in all sports sports.

programme.title: Beach Volley: Pro Tour Elite 16 2025
programme.desc: Brasilia (Men's 3rd place final). The Beach Pro Tour returns to Mexico, which this time will host Elite16 from March 26th to March 30th. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Beach Volley: Pro Tour Elite 16 2025
programme.desc: Brasilia (Men's Final). The Beach Pro Tour returns to Mexico, which this time will host Elite16 from March 26th to March 30th. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Volleyball: Jastrebsky Vegel - Halkbank
programme.desc: CEV Champions League 2025. 3rd Men's Final. The 66th season of the CEV Champions League men host 20 teams in the group stage. Italian Trentino is the owner of the trophy. Description: Panos Loutas.

programme.title: Volleyball: Varta Zaviercie - Perugia
programme.desc: CEV Champions League 2025. Men's final. The 66th season of the CEV Champions League men host 20 teams in the group stage. Italian Trentino is the owner of the trophy. Description: Panos Loutas.

programme.title: Handball: Fouss Berlin - Melsengen (G)
programme.desc: Daikin Bundesliga 2024-25. 31st Racing. The 60th season of the German Handball Championship lasts from August 2024 to June 2025. Of the 18 teams involved, two are relegated, while the top 5 secures a European ticket. Magdeburg won last year's title. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.title: Athletics: World Athletics Continental Tour Gold 2025
programme.desc: Zagreb. The annual series of track and field rallies is the second -run event after the Diamond League and the first 'path' for athletes to major classical sports events, with a total of 12 events on 4 continents. Description: Christos Vassiliou.

programme.title: Sports Classics: 2025 Sports Rundown Ε3
programme.desc: A fascinating journey to arenas, stadiums, gyms and places around the world, where the heartbeat of the hearts of sports echo. Athletes put everything in every sport but you have ever wondered about the person hiding behind the athlete

programme.title: Volleyball: Milan - Vakifbank
programme.desc: CEV Champions League 2025. The 66th season of the CEV Champions League men host 20 teams in the group stage. Italian Trentino is the owner of the trophy. Description: Paul wrestler.

programme.desc: Enjoy even more action than the 'magical' world of the NBA and watch the NBA TV, the official channel of the world's top basketball event daily.

programme.title: Basketball: Fenerbahce - Turkish Telekom (G)
programme.desc: Turkish Basketball Super League 2024-25. Quarter -finals, 1st match. The 59th season of the Turkish basketball championship includes 16 teams. Yalvaspor and Mersin were promoted, while Fenerbahce is the title holder. Description: Rigas Dardalis.
